name: Single-pax single-leg seat change via web + credit card
Single-pax single-leg via text channel (conversational search)
runtime: text channel: 'I'd like a window seat' -> best-fit result

name: Single-pax multi-leg seat change on both legs
chatbot: seat map shows Leg1/Leg2 tabs + 'Next Flights'

name: Two-passenger PNR, seats changed for both
chatbot: multi-pax Note 1: seat map opens directly

name: Multi-journey PNR — user selects RETURN journey
Free seat change (Standard->Standard, $0.00, no payment step)
runtime: widget prices standard seat at CA $0.00 -> payment skipped

name: Seat change paid with acWallet
runtime: acWallet balance CA $100 / fee CA $34

name: Seat change paid with FlexPay (amount > $99)
runtime: premium seat CA $150 -> FlexPay offered

name: Already-authenticated user skips OTP
runtime: active session -> GenUC-05 bypassed

name: Identification by ticket number instead of PNR
chatbot: GenUC-01 accepts the 014 ticket number (see Ticket column)

name: Declines payment, re-selects a different seat, pays
runtime: SC-03 No -> SC-03b Yes -> seat map

name: Declines payment and abandons
runtime: SC-03 No -> SC-03b No -> End

name: Blocked at ACV booking source
divergence: Live rule flow accepts AC_VACATIONS as an ELIGIBLE channel (SC-EL-01). The ACV block is a chatbot/identification-layer decision, not an eligibility-service one.

name: Blocked at OTA booking source
Blocked because passenger is checked in
Blocked because PNR is a group booking
divergence: Live rule flow treats GROUP as an ELIGIBLE channel; ruleGroupPnr only fails when the flight is <6h away (SC-NE-07). A >6h group PNR returns SC-EL-01.

name: Blocked — flight operated by non-AC carrier (LH)
Blocked by EXST SSR
Blocked by PETC SSR
divergence: PETC is NOT in the live sc_blocking_ssr lookup (EXST/CBBG/SVAN/ESAN only) -> SC-EL-01.

name: Blocked — flight departs in <1 hour
Redirected — flight within 24 hours
Blocked by confirmed eUpgrade
divergence: EUPG is not an input to any live seat-change rule -> SC-EL-01. eUpgrade must be enforced in the Seat Change Widget.

name: Blocked — flight already departed
Multi-leg: leg1 AC eligible, leg2 LH ineligible
Invalid PNR — 4 failed identification attempts
runtime: tester types the RESERVED locator (see report); it must NOT exist in trip-tracer

name: Correct PNR, completely wrong name (Levenshtein fail)
runtime: tester enters a wrong surname against the seeded PNR

name: Third-party (OTA) booking -> MANUAL_HANDLING
Empty last name rejected at GenUC-01
runtime: tester submits an empty last name

name: All OTP + IDV attempts exhausted
runtime: 15 wrong OTP + 3 wrong IDV against the seeded contact

name: OTP expires after 5 minutes
runtime: wait >5 min before submitting the OTP

name: Seat map reached but flight is 100% full
runtime: ENVIRONMENTAL: seat inventory comes from the live Seat Change Widget, not the PNR

name: Selected seat taken by another user before confirm
runtime: ENVIRONMENTAL: concurrent seat grab

name: Text channel: 3 failed searches -> My Bookings link
runtime: text channel, 3 no-match preference searches

name: User selects their already-assigned seat
chatbot: current seat 14A is seeded as an RQST SSR

name: Economy pax tries to select a Business seat
runtime: cabin Y booked; widget blocks J seats

name: Payment rejected — expired credit card
runtime: ENVIRONMENTAL: expired card 01/2025

name: FlexPay not offered below $99
runtime: total CA $50

name: Network drop mid-payment — idempotency prevents double charge
runtime: ENVIRONMENTAL

name: Split payment attempt blocked
runtime: ENVIRONMENTAL

name: Child under 12 blocked from exit row
Child under 12 cannot sit in a far row from the adult
runtime: widget proximity logic; seat 30F far from row 14

name: Lap infant blocks the adult from an exit row
Unaccompanied Minor blocked from restricted seats
Multi-child PNR proximity across 2 adults + 2 children
Passenger aged 14 fails the exit-row age requirement
Preferred -> Standard downgrade, no refund
runtime: current paid Preferred seat 5A seeded; widget shows no-refund alert

name: Bassinet seat allowed because an infant is present
Disrupted ACV booking -> ACV live agent
runtime: ENVIRONMENTAL: disruption raised by FDM, not seedable on the PNR
divergence: AC_VACATIONS is an eligible channel for the rule flow; the ACV/LAH transfer is chatbot-side.

name: Seat ADD — booking has no pre-assigned seat
chatbot: no RQST SSR seeded -> 'change/add your seat(s)'

name: Seat change paid with a gift card
runtime: AC gift card with sufficient balance

name: Wrong OTP then correct OTP on retry
runtime: 1 wrong OTP then the correct one

name: OTP resend then successful authentication
runtime: request resend, use the new code

name: 4-passenger PNR, all seats changed at once
3-pax PNR, only one passenger's seat changed
Two browser tabs, only one seat change succeeds
runtime: ENVIRONMENTAL

name: Chatbot + call-centre edit the same PNR
runtime: ENVIRONMENTAL

name: Flight at exactly 23h59m59s -> within-24h redirect
Session timeout while on the seat map
runtime: ENVIRONMENTAL

name: Aircraft swap invalidates the assigned seat
runtime: ENVIRONMENTAL: A320 -> CRJ-200 swap is a flight-level event

name: Flight cancelled by the airline during the flow
runtime: ENVIRONMENTAL

name: Passenger checks in on another channel mid-flow
runtime: starts NOT checked in (no CHECK_IN row); tester checks in via app mid-flow. Pair with TC015's PNR to see the SC-NE-08 end state.

name: 9-passenger PNR
chatbot: SC-03 shows 9 line items + combined total

name: Lap infant needs no separate seat
chatbot: infant has no ticket coupon of its own; has_infant=true on the adult

name: Codeshare: marketing LH, operating AC
divergence: Test case expects eligibility to look only at the OPERATING carrier. The live rule checks BOTH marketing and operating (elig-sc-carrier-validation) -> SC-NE-01.

name: Browser back button on the payment screen
runtime: ENVIRONMENTAL

name: Session restored after a network drop on the seat map
runtime: ENVIRONMENTAL

runtime: acWallet balance below the seat fee -> fallback payment
